name: PAY_RATE_DEFINITIONS_F
description: This table contains the definition of a rate to be used by the rate engine.

columns.Name: RATE_DEFINITION_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key for the Rate Definition

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: SHORT_NAME
columns.Comments: Short name

columns.Name: MANAGEMENT_TYPE_CD
columns.Comments: MANAGEMENT_TYPE_CD

columns.Name: PAY_RATE_DEFINITIONS_F_ALTCD
columns.Comments: PAY_RATE_DEFINITIONS_F_ALTCD

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Pay rate status

columns.Name: BASE_NAME
columns.Comments: Name of the Rate Definition

columns.Name: TYPE
columns.Comments: The Type of Rate Definition, Derived Rate or Rate by Criteria

columns.Name: STORAGE_TYPE
columns.Comments: Storage type: Amount or Percentage

columns.Name: PERIODICITY_TYPE
columns.Comments: This identifies the type of periodicity of the Rate. For example is it Time base in an Annual amount, Monthly Amount, Hourly Amount, etc or is it Unit based, $50 per widget, $15 per meal, etc.

columns.Name: DIR_CARD_COMP_DEF_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key for Card Component Definition

columns.Name: VALUE_BY_CRITERIA_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to the Value by Criteria Definition

columns.Name: VBC_VALUE_IDENTIFIER
columns.Comments: Value Identifier for the leaf node to be used by for the Value by Criteria.

columns.Name: CALCULATION_FORMULA_ID
columns.Comments: Formula used for the calculation.

columns.Name: ELEMENT_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to Element Types

columns.Name: BASE_SALARY_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicate that this can be used as the Base Salary Rate.

columns.Name: OVERALL_SALARY_FLAG
columns.Comments: Indicates that this is the Overall Salary.

columns.Name: REPORTING_RATE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Determines if the Rate is a Reporting Rate, hence stored for Rate Reporting.

columns.Name: USE_REPORT_VALUE_FOR_CALC
columns.Comments: Determines if the Rate Value from the Reporting Table maybe returned as the value.

columns.Name: RETURN_PRECISION
columns.Comments: Precision of the return Amount

columns.Name: RETURN_ROUNDING
columns.Comments: The Rounding type to be used on the Return

columns.Name: DEFAULT_RTN_PERIODICITY
columns.Comments: The Periodicity that should be returned by this Rate by default.

columns.Name: DEFAULT_RTN_CURRENCY
columns.Comments: Return Currency Code

columns.Name: DEFAULT_CALC_PERIODICITY
columns.Comments: The default periodicity that should be used for the calculation

columns.Name: DEFAULT_CALC_CURRENCY
columns.Comments: Calculation Currency

columns.Name: DEFAULT_BAL_DIMENSION_ID
columns.Comments: The Balance Dimension used by default in the calculation

columns.Name: DEFAULT_FACTOR_TYPE
columns.Comments: The type of factor that is to be used

columns.Name: DEFAULT_FACTOR
columns.Comments: The Value that is to be used as the Factor

columns.Name: DEFAULT_FACTOR_INVERSE
columns.Comments: Default for the FACTOR_INVERSE on PAY_RATE_CONTRIBUTORS_F

columns.Name: DEFAULT_FACTOR_IDENTIFIER
columns.Comments: Default Factors of VBC can have an Identifier for the leaf node name.

columns.Name: RETURN_FACTOR_TYPE
columns.Comments: Return Factor Type

columns.Name: RETURN_FACTOR_VALUE
columns.Comments: Return Factor Value

columns.Name: RETURN_FACTOR_INVERSE
columns.Comments: Inverse the Return Factor for calculation

columns.Name: RETURN_FACTOR_IDENTIFIER
columns.Comments: Return factors of VBC may need an Identifier to determine a leaf node to return.

columns.Name: LIMIT_MODE
columns.Comments: Behavior when the rate is outside the minimum rate

columns.Name: MAX_LIMIT_MODE
columns.Comments: Behavior when the rate is outside the maximum rate

columns.Name: MIN_TYPE
columns.Comments: The type that the Min Value is

columns.Name: MIN_VALUE
columns.Comments: The Value of tne Minimum, based on the Min Type

columns.Name: MIN_VALUE_IDENTIFIER
columns.Comments: Minimum Value VBCs may need an identifier to determine the leaf node value.

columns.Name: MAX_TYPE
columns.Comments: The Maximum Value Type

columns.Name: MAX_VALUE
columns.Comments: This is the value of the Maximum Value based on the Type

columns.Name: MAX_VALUE_IDENTIFIER
columns.Comments: Max Value VBCs may require an identifier to determine a leaf node.

columns.Name: CONVERSION_FORMULA_ID
columns.Comments: This is a Fast Formula of Type Rate Conversion and will be used to convert the periodicities used in this Rate Definition

columns.Name: CONVERSION_VBC_ID
columns.Comments: A Value By Criteria Id that contains the factor values for the annualisation functions.

columns.Name: FACTOR_ENTERABLE
columns.Comments: Idicates whether the Primary Rates values are user enterable

columns.Name: AMOUNT_ENTERABLE
columns.Comments: Indicates whether a Primary Rate Amount is enterable.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_ENTERPRISES.

columns.Name: LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUPS.

columns.Name: LEGISLATION_CODE
columns.Comments: Foreign key to FND_TERRITORIES.

columns.Name: DEFAULT_SOURCE_TYPE
columns.Comments: This indicates how  the default value is calculated  for a Primary Rate.

columns.Name: DEFAULT_SOURCE_VALUE
columns.Comments: This is the amount or an ID used to calculate the default Amount.

columns.Name: VALIDATION_FORMULA_ID
columns.Comments: The Foromula Id of a formula that validates the Amount being entered.

columns.Name: DEFAULT_FTE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Default for the FTE Flag

columns.Name: FTE_FLAG
columns.Comments: Full Time Equivalent

columns.Name: MODULE_ID
columns.Comments: Seed Data Framework: indicates the module that owns the row. A module is an entry in Application Taxonomy such as a Logical Business Area. When the MODULE_ID column exists and the owner of the row is not specified, then the Seed Data Framework will not extract the row as seed data.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: SEED_DATA_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Source of seed data record. A value of 'BULK_SEED_DATA_SCRIPT' indicates that record was bulk loaded. Otherwise, specifies the name of the seed data file.

columns.Name: SGUID
columns.Comments: The seed global unique identifier. Oracle internal use only.

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET1
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET1. Context values are Y or N.

columns.Name: ORA_SEED_SET2
columns.Comments: Oracle internal use only. Indicates the edition-based redefinition (EBR) context of the row for SET2. Context values are Y or N.
